description.zh-cn: 周期购/订阅：会员对商品设置按天/周/月的周期，到期自动生成订单。支持「余额自动扣款」与「到期提醒」两种模式，可暂停/恢复/取消；提供 subscription:run 命令(可加入 cron)与后台一键执行。
description.en: Subscription: members set a daily/weekly/monthly cadence for a product; orders are auto-generated when due. Supports wallet auto-charge or reminder modes, pause/resume/cancel; ships a subscription:run command (cron-ready) plus one-click admin run.
